name: Alex Johnson
bio: Met in university during a hackathon. We share a passion for open-source software and weekend hiking trips.

name: Sarah Miller
bio: Former colleague and mentor. Always has the best career advice and book recommendations.

name: Michael Chen
bio: Gym buddy and fellow photography enthusiast. We usually meet up for early morning runs or photo walks.

name: Emily Davis
bio: Grew up in the same neighborhood. Even though we live in different cities now, we try to stay connected.

name: David Wilson
bio: Next-door neighbor. We often play online games together on Friday nights.

name: Jessica Taylor
bio: Met while backpacking in Southeast Asia. She has the most incredible stories from her travels.

name: Ryan Garcia
bio: Guitarist in our local band. We practice every Tuesday and share a love for 90s rock.

name: Sophia Brown
bio: Best friend from high school. We've drifted a bit but I always value our deep conversations.
